title: Isaac Chavira - Foster Global
content:
Isaac Chavira is an attorney at Foster LLP in our Austin office. His practice is focused primarily on employment and family-based immigration, as well as Form I-9 compliance and employer sanctions.
Isaac graduated from The University of Texas at Austin School of Law and received his undergraduate degree from The University of Texas at El Paso. Isaac served as a student attorney at The University of Texas at Austin School of Law Immigration Clinic.
Isaac is licensed to practice in the State of Texas and is an active member of the Austin Bar Association, the American Immigration Lawyers Association (AILA), and the Austin Young Lawyers Association (AYLA).
